description: [ELON] Create Shopify OAuth flow with install, callback, and token storage. Use Shopify's official @shopify/shopify-api SDK. Store access tokens in new shopify_credentials table (shop domain, access token, scopes, installed_at timestamp). Handle authorization URL generation, token exchange, and scope validation (read_orders, read_products, read_customers minimum).
successCriteria: GET /api/shopify/callback?code=XXX&shop=YYY exchanges code for access token
Access token stored in shopify_credentials table
POST /api/shopify/install with valid shop domain initiates OAuth flow
